title: mildella nitidula
intro: Mildella nitidula, also known as the Nitidula plant or Black Snakeroot, is a flowering plant native to parts of North America. The medicinal properties of Mildella nitidula include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are derived from its root and leaves. The health benefits of consuming this plant are said to include relief from asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues, as well as the treatment of fever and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of Mildella nitidula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
